creator: jason@mastaler.com
text:
Port audio/lame needs to be updated to include current download locations.

Also, the port should be updated to make use of the new full source code distribution
rather than the patch against the dist10 ISO demonstration source.

Fix: 

Current sources (lame3.70.tar.gz) can be found at the following locations:

  <http://lame.sourceforge.net/download/beta/lame3.70.tar.gz>
  <ftp://ftp.zlurp.com/source/lame/lame-3.70.tar.gz>
  <ftp://ftp.fu-berlin.de/unix/sound/lame/lame3.70.tar.gz>

This is a full source code distribution.  Patching is no longer required since
all ISO code has now been replaced.

See <http://lame.sourceforge.net/> for more information.
How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/audio/lame ; make fetch

aguirre# cd /usr/ports/audio/lame ; make fetch
